basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Giada as mono-white Angels/counters.
Giada provides ramp and counters specifically for Angel density.
Profile keeps white interaction/protection while avoiding unrelated white weenie shells.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Angel density and curve reduction are more important than generic mono-white staples.
Counters are support, not a separate proliferate deck.

themes.name: angel_typal_counters
themes.notes: Giada ramps Angels and scales later Angels with counters.

themes.name: mono_white_protection
themes.notes: Board protection keeps expensive Angels from being reset.

themes.name: lifegain_combat_airforce
themes.notes: Flying pressure and lifegain stabilize while Angels close.

examples: Soul Sisters package without Angel density
avoid_patterns.reason: Giada's strongest text needs Angel count.

examples: Angel pile with no curve support
avoid_patterns.reason: Giada helps but still needs curve discipline.
